name: Welcome to DragonFruit 👋
description_html:
DragonFruit keeps project context, tasks, docs, and Atlas in one workspace. This starter project is safe to edit or delete as you make it your own.

Start here: open the Brief, replace the sample context with your real goals, then mark this task Done.
description_stripped: DragonFruit keeps project context, tasks, docs, and Atlas in one workspace. This starter project is safe to edit or delete as you make it your own. Start here: open the Brief, replace the sample context with your real goals, then mark this task Done.

name: Add your goals to the Brief ✍️
description_html:
The Brief is the shared source of truth for this project. Add the outcome, audience, constraints, and decisions that everyone should remember.

Atlas reads the Brief on every project task, so clear context here leads to more useful answers.
description_stripped: The Brief is the shared source of truth for this project. Add the outcome, audience, constraints, and decisions that everyone should remember. Atlas reads the Brief on every project task, so clear context here leads to more useful answers.

name: Ask Atlas to plan the first milestone ✨
description_html:
Open Atlas from the right sidebar and try one of the starter actions, or ask: Using this Brief, plan our first milestone and create the tasks.

You can review and refine the plan before work begins.
description_stripped: Open Atlas from the right sidebar and try one of the starter actions, or ask: Using this Brief, plan our first milestone and create the tasks. You can review and refine the plan before work begins.

name: Create and assign your first task ✅
description_html: Create a task from the Tasks tab or the New task button. Give it a clear owner, state, priority, and due date so the next action is obvious.
description_stripped: Create a task from the Tasks tab or the New task button. Give it a clear owner, state, priority, and due date so the next action is obvious.

name: Write a doc and connect live tasks 🔗
description_html: Use Docs for plans, specs, notes, and decisions. While writing, press / to create or embed a task so the document and tracker stay connected.
description_stripped: Use Docs for plans, specs, notes, and decisions. While writing, press / to create or embed a task so the document and tracker stay connected.

name: Add deadlines in Calendar 📅
description_html: Open Calendar to see tasks by date. Click a day to add work where it belongs, or add a due date to an existing task and watch it appear on the calendar.
description_stripped: Open Calendar to see tasks by date. Click a day to add work where it belongs, or add a due date to an existing task and watch it appear on the calendar.

name: Invite your team and make it yours 🤝
description_html: Invite teammates from workspace settings, assign the next tasks, and replace these starter items with real work. Your Brief will keep people and Atlas aligned as the project changes.
description_stripped: Invite teammates from workspace settings, assign the next tasks, and replace these starter items with real work. Your Brief will keep people and Atlas aligned as the project changes.
